site.name: ForThePeople.in
site.tagline: Your District. Your Data. Your Right.
site.disclaimer: ForThePeople.in is an independent citizen transparency initiative. This is NOT an official government website. All data is sourced from publicly available government portals under India's Open Data Policy (NDSAP).

footer.disclaimer: Independent citizen initiative. NOT an official government website. Data under NDSAP.

india.title: India in one page.
india.subtitle: Every key fact about your country, sourced from official government portals.

suggestions.title: Vote for the next India module
suggestions.subtitle: Help us decide what to build next.
suggestions.submitted: Thanks — your idea is now visible to others to vote on.
suggestions.rateLimit: You've already voted on this. Try tomorrow.

awaitingSync.title: Awaiting first sync
awaitingSync.subtitle: We will populate this section as soon as the source publishes.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.subtitle: Every portal cited on this page.

disclaimers.top: ForThePeople.in is NOT an official government website. Data aggregated from official portals (NDSAP), accredited research institutions, and verified public sources. Always verify at the original source.
disclaimers.defence: Data on this page is limited to information publicly disclosed by the Ministry of Defence, Press Information Bureau, and Parliamentary Q&A. ForThePeople.in does not publish, infer, or speculate on classified, operational, or strategic information.
disclaimers.health: Aggregated public-health statistics only. Personal health data and individual hospital outcomes are not published. Consult a registered medical practitioner for health decisions.
disclaimers.elections: Electoral data is for citizen information. ForThePeople.in does not endorse, predict, or campaign for any party or candidate.
disclaimers.justice: Aggregated case statistics from NJDG. Individual case details are not published.
disclaimers.mcc: Model Code of Conduct in effect. ForThePeople.in is non-partisan and complies with ECI guidelines.

macroSnapshot.title: India at a Glance
macroSnapshot.tagline: How big India is, how fast it's growing, and how its 1.43 billion people earn and live.

knowIndia.title: Know About India
knowIndia.tagline: NCERT-aligned foundations: history, geography, polity, economy. How India works, explained.

livingStandards.title: Living Standards
livingStandards.tagline: Health, education, water, food, housing — what daily life looks like across states.

wildlifeForests.title: Wildlife & Forests
wildlifeForests.tagline: Tigers, forests, protected areas — what India safeguards in the wild.

agricultureLivestock.title: Agriculture & Livestock
agricultureLivestock.tagline: What India grows and raises — crops, livestock, and the lives of farmers.

naturalResourcesEnergy.title: Natural Resources & Energy
naturalResourcesEnergy.tagline: Fuels, minerals, water — what powers India and what we draw from the earth.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.tagline: Roads, rail, aviation, ports, telecom, smart cities — the country's backbone.

governance.title: Governance and Justice
governance.tagline: Defence, police, courts, prisons, elections — the institutions that hold India together.

innovation.title: Innovation and Industry
innovation.tagline: Space, science, startups, digital, foreign trade — where India is going next.

culture.title: Culture and Heritage
culture.tagline: Tourism, monuments, sports, GI tags — what makes India distinctly Indian.
